cxu_object.claim: Entries must be blocked for a minimum of 2 consecutive regime-evaluation ticks (approximately 5 minutes) following any regime transition. If the detected regime at entry-decision time differs from the regime at the previous evaluation tick, no new position should be opened regardless of signal consensus. This prevents the open→regime-flip→close→reopen churn loop that generates $24+ in fees per leg with zero captured edge. The block applies to both long and short entries and resets on each regime change.

supporting_contexts.text: Three confirmed churn cycles all share the same structure: position opened in regime A, regime transitions to B triggering close, new position opened in regime A or B immediately after. Fees per cycle: ~$72-$97. Net P&L per cycle: $0.00. The entry immediately after a regime flip is the proximate cause of the third fee in each cycle.
